name: Lisas' Quick Southwest Hot Dip
recipeIngredient: 16 oz refried beans (from a 16 oz can)
16 oz favorite chili (from a 16 oz can)
Bag of favorite tortilla chips or Fritos
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the refried beans in the bottom of a 9-inch deep dish pie plate.
2. Sprinkle about 4 ounces each of shredded cheddar and Monterey jack cheeses over the beans.
3. Slice the cream cheese thinly and layer it over the beans and cheeses.
4. Pour the chili (or homemade chili) over the layered mixture.
5. Top with the remaining shredded cheeses.
6. Microwave on high power for 5 minutes or until bubbly and heated through.
7. Serve with chips.
